cross_layer_contracts: Bead-Pane Contract: gastown Bead ID → herdr Pane ID (stdout pattern matching)
Skill-Planning Contract: skill loading on pane start ⇄ Markdown checklist update
Multiplexer-Orchestrator Contract: herdr sidebar status ⇄ gastown Bead status lifecycle
State-Resume Contract: planning-with-files Markdown ⇄ gastown checkpoint/resume
Tool-Memory Contract: MCP server output ⇄ planning-with-files capture
